stack: Next.js 15.5 + TS strict + Tailwind 3 + Dexie + Auth.js + Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini SDKs

extras.demo_mode: one-click seeded inbox (12 emails) — no API keys needed
extras.byok_supported: users can paste their own Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini key in Settings; keys stay in IndexedDB
extras.live_llm_verification: Settings -> Save & verify runs a one-message test against the chosen provider and persists the green status
